resources.string: Connect Hermes to a Feishu or Lark bot to receive terminal notifications, run commands via chat, and get real-time alerts on your phone.
Select whether you use the Chinese (Feishu) or international (Lark) version.
For users in mainland China. Uses open.feishu.cn endpoints.
For users outside mainland China. Uses open.larksuite.com endpoints.

Follow these steps to create a bot application:

1. Open the Developer Console
2. Click "Create Custom App"
3. Fill in the app name and description
4. Under "Permissions & Scopes", enable:
 • im:message (Send messages)
 • im:message.receive_v1 (Receive messages)
5. Under "Event Subscriptions", add the message receive event
6. Note down your App ID and App Secret from the Credentials page
Please enter both App ID and App Secret
Maintains a persistent connection. Best for real-time messaging. Works behind NAT/firewalls.
Requires a publicly accessible URL. Hermes will POST events to your endpoint.
Scan this QR code with Feishu/Lark to pair with your bot.
Your Feishu/Lark bot is configured and ready.
Are you sure you want to cancel? No settings will be saved.
Enter the App ID and App Secret from your Feishu/Lark application credentials page.
